Zinc alloy body + IML bottom case

mediaList.title: Vibrant Colors at Your Fingertips!
mediaList.description: Showcasing a variety of color options, allowing you to embrace individuality and style!

mediaList.title: Bluetooth Call Support, Never Miss A Call.
mediaList.description: You can answer calls on your watch with a single touch and talk directly through its built-in microphone and speaker. The watch syncs contacts from your phone, allowing you to quickly call anyone you want within seconds.

mediaList.title: Multi Payment & Offline Payment Support
mediaList.description: This watch supports offline payment and collection through popular platforms such as PayPal, WeChat Pay, and Alipay. It enables quick and convenient transactions with a simple wrist gesture.

mediaList.title: NFC & Tiktok Controller
mediaList.description: This wrist device serves as both a smart key and supports analog access control cards for NFC unlocking. Additionally, it functions as a Bluetooth remote control for short videos, offering a unique and enhanced entertainment experience.

mediaList.title: IP68 Water resistance
mediaList.description: This watch has an IP68 water resistance rating, allowing you to freely wear it during open water swimming or in the pool without any concerns.

mediaList.title: Outdoor Altitude Pressure Function
mediaList.description: The watch features a built-in altitude pressure sensor that provides real-time numerical indication of outdoor altitude and barometric pressure. It offers professional data support for your outdoor activities.

mediaList.title: One Watch For Every Outfit
mediaList.description: Customize your watch to match your mood, outfit, or the occasion with over 100 stylish watch faces available at the dial store. You can even upload your own photo as the background image for a truly personalized touch.

mediaList.title: Real Titanium, More Details.
mediaList.description: Made of lightweight titanium, the watch is wear-resistant, scratch-resistant, and corrosion-resistant. It can handle sweat, bumps, and close inspection with ease.

indexConfig.page_keywords: N9 ULTRA PRO, Smart Watch, Apple Watch, High Performance Smart Watch, Fashion Smart Watch
indexConfig.page_description: N9 ULTRA PRO is a powerful smartwatch with advanced features and innovative design similar to Apple Watch. It combines stylish appearance and high-performance technology to provide users with an excellent smart experience.
